_comment: DROP-IN REPLACEMENT for any 'n8n-nodes-base.awsS3' or 'n8n-nodes-base.s3' upload node. Copy this Code node into your workflow wherever you have a broken S3 upload. Wire the input to provide $json.fileKey (string) and $json.fileContent (string). Optionally pass $json.bucket (defaults to 'obsidian-vault') and $json.contentType (defaults to 'text/markdown').
name: MinIO: Upload File (HTTP)
